title: Premium Dark-Mode Restaurant Food-Photography Asset Suite (Hero, Menu Tiles, Logo Vector)
one_line_ask: From the client's raw food photos and logo, produce a dark-mode-ready food-photography asset suite — a color-graded wide hero banner, clean-backdrop menu tiles, a mobile crop, and a vector logo — for a premium restaurant website.

issues: Plate sits on a near-black/dark-grey surface rather than the specified mid-tone wood table, reducing the meaningfulness of the backdrop-isolation step for the designer
Tilt appears minimal/barely perceptible — may be under the intended ~4 degrees, giving auto-straighten less real work than briefed
Olive oil drizzle and paprika dusting are present but the oil sheen is subtle; could be slightly more pronounced for the grade step to matter
Second plate partially visible top-left is a minor compositional element not mentioned in brief, though not harmful
Very slight warm color cast (tungsten) — acceptable per brief, designer to correct
Shallow DOF causes minor softness on rear steak portion — acceptable per brief
Coarse sea salt flakes scatter to slate edges, marginally busy but within documentary realism
Bordelaise smear is slightly heavy/pooled rather than a clean chef's swipe — minor compositional note
No severe AI artifacts detected; meat fibers, fat render, and juice sheen appear photographically authentic
Edges are slightly soft, but this is acceptable for a raster source asset.
Wordmark is in a high-contrast serif but could be slightly more elegant (minor subjective note, not a deduction).
No major vector artifacts, but minor rasterization softness is present as expected.
No gradients or photographic texture; color is solid warm-gold.
Transparent background is correct for a source PNG.
Edges are slightly soft as expected for raster source — acceptable per brief
Minor luminance noise visible on transparent/checker background area — acceptable per brief
Octopus tentacle linework is slightly asymmetrical between left and right sides — minor but within tolerance for a source asset requiring vectorization
